emails.subject: PIN-HOM-533661 - Claim form, tenancy agreement and EOW photos (Aberdeen AB10)
emails.body_text:
Dear Claims,

We're submitting the completed claim form, tenancy agreement, and photos for an escape of water affecting a rented flat in Aberdeen (AB10) under policyholder Mr J. Fraser. Claim reference: PIN-HOM-533661.

Please confirm cover and excess and advise next steps for initial assessment.

Regards,
Bridgegate Brokers Claims

emails.subject: Positive feedback - PIN-HOM-520119
emails.body_text:
Passing along positive feedback from Mr Lane on handling of PIN-HOM-520119--he praised clear updates and empathy. Great work.

Customer Services

emails.subject: PIN-HOM-483912 - Adjuster appointment update
emails.body_text:
Dear Mr Ashford,

Thank you for your update last week on PIN-HOM-483912 (burglary at your property in Didsbury). We've noted the new locks fitted. We are awaiting confirmation from the adjuster on appointment availability and will revert with a date.

Kind regards,
Priya Nair
Home Claims Handler
Pinnacle Insurance

emails.subject: PIN-MTR-552301 - Parts authority required (Volvo V40 rear bumper & sensors)
emails.body_text:
Morning,

We're chasing parts authority for PIN-MTR-552301 (2019 Volvo V40 - rear bumper, sensors and loom). We submitted the OEM parts list and labour hours last week and the customer is on our back about completion timing. Please confirm if we can order today.

Attached: Estimate and parts breakdown (OEM).

Thanks,
Steel City Bodyshop Service Team

emails.body_text:
Your parcel will be delivered today and requires a signature at head office. Track your parcel using the link below.

emails.subject: Policy query - Storm damage to original sash windows (Grade II, York YO1)
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle,

I own a Grade II listed townhouse in York (YO1). We've had storm damage to original sash windows and I'd like to understand if our policy covers repair or replacement of historic features, and whether you have approved heritage glaziers.

Policy no: HOM-LT-882113

Please advise on cover, matching items considerations, and any contractors you recommend.

Kind regards,
Edward Marston
Marston & Co.

emails.subject: Application - Marketing Executive (CV attached)
emails.body_text:
Dear HR Team,

Please find my CV attached for the Marketing Executive role. Apologies if this is the wrong mailbox.

Regards,
Emma Jenkins

emails.subject: PIN-HOM-508377 - CCTV drain survey and photos (root ingress identified)
emails.body_text:
Hi Team,

Attached is the CCTV survey report and photographs for the collapsed drain at the semi-detached house in Leicester (LE2), subsidence claim PIN-HOM-508377. The footage indicates significant root ingress from the pavement ash tree.

Please review findings and advise on next steps, including any liaison with the local authority about the street tree.

Regards,
Rapid Drainage Reports

emails.subject: Policy query - Malicious damage by tenants (buy-to-let, Cardiff CF24)
emails.body_text:
Hello Pinnacle,

I'm a landlord in Cardiff (CF24). Can you confirm whether malicious damage by tenants is covered under my buy‑to‑let policy and what evidence you'd need? We are planning an eviction and want to be clear on requirements should we need to claim.

Thanks,
Dylan Hughes

emails.subject: Invoice - PIN-MTR-552301 (GBP2,186.40 incl. VAT) - storage accrual from Friday
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle,

Please find attached our final invoice for PIN-MTR-552301 (2019 Volvo V40) totalling GBP2,186.40 incl. VAT. Note that storage charges will accrue from Friday unless payment/authority is received.

Kindly validate against the approved estimate and advise on payment timing to avoid storage.

Regards,
QuickFix Garage Accounts

emails.body_text:

emails.subject: Policy query - Mobility scooter stolen from locked shed (IV2)
emails.body_text:
Hello,

Would theft of a mobility scooter from a locked garden shed be covered under my home policy? Do I need proof of purchase? I'm in Inverness (IV2).

Regards,
R. MacPherson

emails.subject: Public liability limit and notification requirements - Baltic wedding (temporary staff)
emails.body_text:
Hi,

I'm an event florist in Newcastle (NE1). Please confirm my public liability limit and any notification requirements for a large wedding at the Baltic next month. Are temporary staff covered under my policy?

Policy no: LIA-PL-992311

Thanks,
Sarah
Blossom & Bloom

emails.subject: FNOL: Van theft - Renault Trafic stolen in NE6, tools inside (crime ref 2602X/2026)
emails.body_text:
Hi Claims Team,

My 2014 Renault Trafic van (reg: BJ14 UMX) was stolen overnight from outside my house in Byker, Newcastle (NE6). The van had copper piping and battery tools worth around GBP3,000 inside. I've reported it to Northumbria Police - crime ref: 2602X/2026.

I have a tracker installed and it pinged near Gateshead around 02:30 but then went silent. I don't have a spare vehicle, so I need help with a hire van if my policy allows.

Policy no: MTR-COM-554872
Contact: 07876 991002

Please open a theft claim and tell me what proof of ownership and tools inventory you need. Happy to send receipts. Also, let me know about any limits on tools left in the van overnight.

Regards,
Nathan Bradley Plumbing & Heating

emails.subject: Scottish Claims - March annual leave rota and cover
emails.body_text:
Please find attached the Scottish claims team annual leave rota for March, including cover for Glasgow and Aberdeen regions.

Regards,
Scotland Team

emails.subject: PIN-LIA-744552 - Physiotherapy notes and discharge report attached
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle Liability Team,

Please find attached treatment notes and the discharge report for the whiplash claimant linked to PIN-LIA-744552. Sessions were completed at Glasgow West Physio (G12) over January and early February. The documents include session dates, exercises, and prognosis.

Kindly confirm receipt and whether any further information is required.

Regards,
Admin Team
Glasgow West Physio

emails.subject: CF10 café slip-and-fall incident - request to open PL claim
emails.body_text:
Dear Claims Team,

We had a slip-and-fall incident outside our café this morning in Cardiff city centre (CF10). Rainwater pooled just inside the entrance and a customer fell. Staff completed an incident report and we have CCTV that shows the area and the fall.

We've assisted the customer and logged the incident. Please open a public liability claim and advise what you need from us (CCTV, incident report, witness statements). Our café details are below.

Cafe Name: Hayes Street Café, CF10
Contact: 07803 441221

Regards,
Eleri Hughes
Manager

emails.subject: PIN-LIA-771045 - Status of indemnity position and timetable
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle Claims,

We served our client's orthopaedic report under PIN-LIA-771045 ten days ago and have not yet received your indemnity position or an indication of your timetable for response and any offer. The incident involved a trip on uneven paving outside the insured's premises in Leith (EH6).

Please confirm receipt of the report and advise next steps.

Regards,
Kirsty MacLeod
Caledonia Law
0131 228 7711

emails.subject: Scheduled system outage - Guidewire (Sat 22:00-02:00)
emails.body_text:
Heads-up: Guidewire claims system outage scheduled Saturday 22:00-02:00 for patching. No action required; please use downtime procedures if you're working.

Regards,
IT Operations

emails.subject: PIN-HOM-520119 - Stolen e‑bike documents (photos, receipt, serial, CCTV)
emails.body_text:
Hi,

Submitting documents for PIN-HOM-520119 (stolen e‑bike, Glasgow G3). I've attached photos, the purchase receipt, and the serial number sticker image. Our concierge shared CCTV stills as well.

Please confirm what else you need and whether theft from a communal hallway is covered under my policy conditions. I can provide the police crime reference if you don't already have it.

Thanks,
Liam Mitchell
G3

emails.subject: Invoice - PIN-LIA-744552 (GBP560) - treatment completed, remittance details enclosed
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle Liability Team,

Attached is our invoice bundle for completed treatment under PIN-LIA-744552 totaling GBP560. Remittance details and the schedule of sessions are included.

Please cross‑check against authorised sessions and confirm payment.

Regards,
PhysioCare Scotland Accounts

emails.subject: Invoice - PIN-HOM-547299 - Weekend make-safe (tarp) with photos
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle,

Attached is our invoice for the weekend call‑out to tarp the storm‑damaged roof at PIN-HOM-547299 (Swansea SA1). Please see the out‑of‑hours premium and photos of the make‑safe work.

Kind regards,
BayBuild Response Accounts

emails.subject: FNOL: Storm damage to listed holiday cottage roof (IV51) - urgent make-safe required
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle,

I own a holiday cottage near Portree, Isle of Skye (IV51). Last night's gale has ripped multiple slates from the roof of my listed property. There's water coming into the lounge and the plaster on the ceiling is bowing.

The property is currently vacant but my neighbour has placed buckets and sent me photos. Please register a home claim and arrange for a local emergency roofer to make safe and tarp it. As it's a listed building, I'd like a loss adjuster with heritage experience, and confirmation of any listed building requirements in the process.

Policy number: HOM-HOL-993241
Contact: 07498 220673

Kind regards,
Mhairi Smith

emails.subject: Amber wind warning - North East England (prepare for FNOL surge)
emails.body_text:
Met Office amber wind warning for North East England tomorrow. Likely disruption; please prepare for an FNOL surge. Guidance attached.

Risk Team

emails.body_text:
I'm away until next Monday. For urgent matters, please contact the office. 

BayBuild Response

emails.subject: Complaint - Courtesy van not provided (PIN-MTR-560442)
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle,

Five days after you told me a courtesy van would be sorted for PIN-MTR-560442, nothing has materialised. I've had multiple missed call-backs and I'm losing income each day without the van.

Please escalate and arrange a hire vehicle today. I expect some goodwill given the inconvenience.

Regards,
Connor Rafferty
Liverpool L13
Tel: 07761 552144

emails.subject: Data protection breach - PIN-LIA-752388 (mis-sent documents)
emails.body_text:
Dear Sirs,

We write to allege a data protection breach in relation to PIN-LIA-752388. Documents were emailed to the wrong party. Please provide details of the incident and confirm escalation to your Data Protection Officer. Our client reserves all rights.

We ask that you secure any mis‑sent data immediately and provide confirmation of steps taken.

Yours faithfully,
Daniel Jameson
Taylor & Sons Solicitors

emails.subject: FOS decisions - subsidence disputes (summary and key learnings)
emails.body_text:
Dear Home Claims Team,

Please find attached our summary of recent Financial Ombudsman Service decisions relevant to subsidence disputes, with key learning points highlighted for handlers. Areas include root ingress, evidence standards, and communication expectations.

Regards,
Pinnacle Legal Updates

emails.subject: PIN-HOM-419876 - Subsidence remediation timeline and tenant concerns
emails.body_text:
Hi Claims,

Re: PIN-HOM-419876 (West Bridgford, NG2) - we completed crack monitoring 8 weeks ago. The tenant is now reporting sticking doors and is anxious about safety. The landlord has asked when underpinning will start.

Could you please confirm the adjuster's conclusions and the contractor mobilisation dates? We'll need to set expectations on duration and whether alternative accommodation is appropriate.

Thanks,
Sam Ramsey
Harper Broking

emails.subject: Weekly canteen menu
emails.body_text:
This week's canteen menu is attached. 

Enjoy,
Canteen Team

emails.subject: Complaint escalation - PIN-HOM-544210 (storm damage repudiation, wind-driven rain)
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle Claims,

We're escalating a client complaint regarding your repudiation of storm damage to a holiday let in Cardiff Bay (CF10), claim PIN-HOM-544210. We believe your interpretation of wind‑driven rain is ambiguous in the policy wording.

We have provided meteorological data indicating wind speeds and rainfall patterns consistent with ingress. Please review the declinature rationale and confirm the formal complaint pathway.

Regards,
Sarah Thomas
Welsh Cover Brokers

emails.subject: Underwriting bulletin - Flood excess waiver withdrawn (Cumbria high-risk bands)
emails.body_text:
Underwriting bulletin: Flood excess waiver will be withdrawn for postcodes in high-risk bands in Cumbria from next month. This is a heads-up to Claims--expect customer queries and check messaging.

UW Team

emails.subject: PIN-LIA-663210 - Request for interim BI payment and timeline
emails.body_text:
Hello,

I'm chasing the business interruption payout under PIN-LIA-663210. We had to close the café temporarily for investigation after a customer injury claim. I sent our takings records last week and we're struggling with payroll--could you arrange an interim payment to cover wages?

Please confirm your indemnity approach and likely timeline.

Thanks,
Megan Evans
Wrexham (LL11)

emails.subject: Windscreen chip repair - process and NCD impact (Skoda Fabia 2017)
emails.body_text:
Hi,

I've got a small chip in my 2017 Skoda Fabia windscreen. What's the process to get it repaired and will it affect my no claims discount? If you have a preferred supplier, please share their contact details.

Thanks,
Nina Patel
Manchester M14

emails.subject: FNOL: Late-night kitchen fire at Headingley (LS6) - smoke damage and cracked sash window
emails.body_text:
Hello Pinnacle Claims,

I'm reporting a kitchen fire at our Victorian terrace in Headingley, Leeds (LS6 2...). An oil pan ignited late last night and the fire brigade attended and extinguished it. We're all safe, but there is smoke damage through the ground floor, some scorched cabinets, and one of the sash windows has cracked from the heat.

The children are temporarily staying with their grandparents in Roundhay so we can clean up. I've attached a few photos from this morning. Please register a home claim and let me know about next steps for assessment, emergency clean-up, and whether you can help with short‑term accommodation if required.

Policy number: HOM-PL-771932
Contact: 07885 662144

Thank you,
Amelia Hartley

emails.subject: PIN-HOM-489020 - Scope, itemised estimate and programme (heritage coving)
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle Claims,

Please find attached our detailed scope of works, itemised estimate, and programme for reinstatement following the kitchen fire at Sheffield (S7) under PIN-HOM-489020. Note: the heritage coving will require a specialist subcontractor.

Kindly review against the adjuster's recommendations and advise on authority or any revisions required.

Regards,
Estimating Team
Whitaker Restoration

emails.subject: FNOL: 2018 Kia Sportage inundated by tidal surge in Morecambe (LA4)
emails.body_text:
Dear Claims Team,

I need to report a serious incident with my vehicle. My 2018 Kia Sportage (reg: FN18 ZJO) was inundated by seawater during the overnight tidal surge in Morecambe. It was parked along the promenade near LA4 5AS, and when I went to it this morning the interior was soaked, the electrics were flickering on and off, and there's a strong saltwater smell. The engine won't start.

I've attached photos and a short video from my phone showing the state of the cabin and the water line. I'm a self‑employed decorator and rely on the car for booked jobs this week, so I need guidance on recovery and a hire car if possible.

Policy number: MTR-PL-239011
Contact: 07974 215836

Please can you register the claim and arrange recovery to an approved site as soon as possible? Also advise whether this is likely to be a total loss or if decontamination is attempted.

Thanks,
James Turner
Morecambe

emails.subject: Office lunch deals - 20% off platters (City Deli Leeds)
emails.body_text:
Enjoy office lunch discounts this week! Get 20% off platters and free delivery in Leeds city centre. Subscribe for more offers.

City Deli Leeds

emails.body_text:
Boost your website rankings with our premium SEO services. We guarantee top positions and more leads. Reply to get a free audit.

emails.subject: PIN-HOM-547299 - Arboricultural report and recommendation (sectional dismantling)
emails.body_text:
Hello,

Attached is our arboricultural report for the storm-damaged oak overhanging a bungalow in York (YO24), claim PIN-HOM-547299. The main crotch is split and due to the target area risk we recommend sectional dismantling.

Please review against policy cover and advise if you need a second quote. We can schedule works within 10 days if authorised.

Regards,
Caledonian Tree Services

emails.body_text:

Harper & Vale Insurance

emails.subject: Formal complaint - PIN-HOM-501772 (chimney collapse delays and poor communication)
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle Claims,

We wish to lodge a formal complaint regarding the handling of PIN-HOM-501772 (chimney collapse following a storm). It took three weeks to arrange temporary repairs and communication has been poor throughout. We had to heat only one room to keep warm.

Please acknowledge this complaint and confirm the next steps and a single point of contact.

Yours sincerely,
Peter & Janet Howard
Durham DH1
Tel: 07779 241802

emails.subject: Site attendance - PIN-HOM-555901 (Keswick CA12) - report to follow
emails.body_text:
FYI: We attended site in Keswick (CA12) today for PIN-HOM-555901. A full report will follow tomorrow.

Regards,
Border Loss Adjusters

emails.subject: PIN-MTR-590234 - Fraud status update and RI scheduling
emails.body_text:
Hi Motor Theft Team,

Can we get a status update on PIN-MTR-590234 (Hyundai i40 theft - Gateshead)? The telematics anomaly we discussed at last week's case conference remains unresolved. Is the claim still on hold and has a recorded interview been scheduled with the policyholder?

Please confirm planned actions and dates.

Fraud Team

emails.subject: PIN-MTR-575842 - Dashcam footage link and liability stance (A184 roundabout)
emails.body_text:
Good afternoon,

Please find enclosed a secure link to dashcam footage relating to PIN-MTR-575842 (roundabout incident on A184, Gateshead). Our liability stance letter proposing a 50/50 apportionment is attached.

Secure link: https://secure.northernmutual.co.uk/dashcam/PIN-MTR-575842
Access code: A184-575842

Kindly review the footage and advise your position.

Regards,
Northern Mutual Motor Claims

emails.subject: Complaint and request to reopen - PIN-HOM-536909 (damp/mould, tenant health)
emails.body_text:
To whom it may concern,

I'm very upset that our damp/mould claim PIN-HOM-536909 was closed without anyone coming to look. I sent photos and explained our tenant has health concerns (breathing issues). We are not neglecting maintenance--this is getting worse.

Please reopen and arrange an inspection as soon as possible. I need clear timescales and a named contact. I want to log this as a formal complaint.

Sadia Khan
Birmingham B29

emails.subject: Invoice - PIN-HOM-419876 (GBP1,140 + VAT) - monitoring logs attached
emails.body_text:
Dear Pinnacle,

Please find attached our invoice for six months of crack monitoring at the Leeds (LS17) property under PIN-HOM-419876. The invoice totals GBP1,140 + VAT. Monitoring logs are attached for filing.

Regards,
Northshore Engineering Billing
